theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Choose how VRX looks on this device.

labelScheme.label: Instance labels
labelScheme.description: Which platform's terms the instance-type pills use.

hotThreshold.label: Hot instance threshold
hotThreshold.description: Minimum friends in one world before it counts as hot.

online.label: Friend comes online
online.description: Alert when an offline friend comes online.
online.aria: Notify when a friend comes online

inGame.label: Friend joins a world
inGame.description: Alert when a friend enters a different world or instance.
inGame.aria: Notify when a friend joins a world

offline.label: Friend goes offline
offline.description: Alert when an online friend goes offline.
offline.aria: Notify when a friend goes offline

hotInstance.label: Hot instance
hotInstance.description: Alert when enough friends gather in the same instance.
hotInstance.aria: Notify when an instance becomes hot

accounts.heading: Accounts
